case_title: JOSE PINTO et al VS. JORGE VALLE et al

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF DEC-11-2013 CONTINUED TO JAN-22-2014 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-04-2014 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JAN-22-2014 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PINTO, JOSE ROCHA, CARLOS JAVIER AS TO DEFENDANT VALLE, JORGE DOES 1 TO 20 INCL. AREVALO, JUAN CARLOS

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PINTO, JOSE ROCHA, CARLOS JAVIER AS TO DEFENDANT VALLE, JORGE DOES 1 TO 20 INCL. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR DEC-11-2013 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-07-2013 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         NOV-26-2013
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAR-04-2014 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE ON DEFENDANT JORGE VALLE
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
